zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Carlyle於1410年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾托瓦爾德時，她的父親John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald9歲，母親Elizabeth Kirkpatrick9歲。她於大約1435年與Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1482年享年72歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭度福利爾德盧姆藍利 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Carlyle于1410年出生在苏格兰度福利爾托瓦爾德时，她的父亲John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald9岁，母亲Elizabeth Kirkpatrick9岁。她于大约1435年与Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig在英国苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1482年享年72岁，埋葬在苏格兰度福利爾德盧姆藍利 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Carlyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish (Dumfriesshire): variant of   Carlisle  .

variants.name: Carlisle
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from the Cumbrian city of Carlisle, in whose name Celtic cair ‘fort’ has been compounded with the Romano-British name of the settlement, Luguvalium.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Carlyle was born in 1410, in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, was 9 and her mother, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, was 9. She married Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig about 1435, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1482, at the age of 72, and was buried in Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Carlyle est née en 1410, à Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, avait 9 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig environ 1435, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1482, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Carlyle 1410 in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald 9 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Kirkpatrick 9. Sie hat um 1435 in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1482 im Alter von 72 Jahren und wurde in Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Carlyle è nata il nel 1410 nel Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, aveva 9 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, aveva 9 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig circa 1435, nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1482, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Carlyleが1410年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアトルソルワルドで生まれた時，父John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwaldは9歳，母Elizabeth Kirkpatrickは9歳であった。約1435年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでSir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1482年に72歳で死去し，スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアドルムランリグ カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Carlyle(이)가 1410년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 토르토월드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald(은)는 9세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Kirkpatrick(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 대략 1435년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드럼랜리그 카스틀에 묻혔다.

mn.Whittingham, East Lothian, Scotland: Lodainn an Ear, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Carlyle nasceu em 1410, em Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, tinha 9 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, tinha 9 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig aproximadamente 1435, em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1482, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Carlyle родилась в 1410 г. в местности тортаурвалд, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig около 1435 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1482 г. в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности друмланриг кастл, думфриессхир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Carlyle nació en 1410, en Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, tenía 9 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig aproximadamente 1435, en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1482, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.
